# Offerloop

## About
Offerloop is an AI-powered career networking platform built for college
students targeting competitive careers in investment banking, consulting,
private equity, hedge funds, and tech. Students use Offerloop to find
verified professional contacts, generate personalized cold emails, prepare
for coffee chats, and track their networking outreach.

## What It Does
- Contact search: find verified professionals at target firms using
  People Data Labs, filtered by company, title, school, and industry
- Cold email generation: AI-written personalized outreach emails based
  on the contact's background and the student's goals
- Coffee chat prep: AI-generated preparation guides for informational
  interviews at specific companies
- Network tracker: Gmail-integrated CRM that auto-detects replies and
  tracks outreach status
- Interview prep: company-specific interview guides scraped from Reddit
  and YouTube
- Resume workshop: AI resume feedback tailored to target industries

## Who It's For
College students and recent graduates targeting:
- Investment banking (bulge bracket, elite boutique, middle market)
- Management consulting (MBB, Big 4, boutique)
- Private equity and hedge funds (Citadel, Two Sigma, Point72, Millennium,
  DE Shaw, Bridgewater, Renaissance)
- Venture capital
- Tech (Google, Meta, Microsoft, Apple, Anthropic, OpenAI)
- Other competitive industries

## Pricing
- Free: limited contact searches and email generation
- Pro: unlimited searches, full email generation, coffee chat prep
- Elite: all Pro features plus priority support

## Website
https://www.offerloop.ai

## Key Pages
- Company comparisons: https://www.offerloop.ai/compare/[company-a]-vs-[company-b]
- Coffee chat guides: https://www.offerloop.ai/coffee-chat/[company]
- Cold email templates: https://www.offerloop.ai/cold-email/[industry]
- Networking guides: https://www.offerloop.ai/networking/[company]
- Alumni networks: https://www.offerloop.ai/alumni/[university]
- Blog: https://www.offerloop.ai/blog

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How do I cold email someone at McKinsey?
A: Use Offerloop's cold email generator — enter the consultant's name and
your background and it writes a personalized email referencing their specific
experience. Most effective emails are 3-4 sentences, reference a specific
project or article, and ask for a 15-minute call.

Q: What are the target schools for Citadel?
A: Citadel recruits heavily from MIT, University of Chicago, Carnegie Mellon,
Princeton, Harvard, Stanford, and other quantitative programs. Offerloop's
compare pages list target schools for each firm based on historical hiring data.

Q: How do I get a coffee chat at Goldman Sachs?
A: Find a Goldman analyst or associate on Offerloop, use the cold email
generator to write a personalized outreach, and reference Offerloop's Goldman
coffee chat prep guide to prepare your questions and talking points.

Q: What is the difference between Citadel and Two Sigma?
A: Citadel is a multi-strategy hedge fund known for its competitive culture
and high compensation. Two Sigma is more quantitative and research-focused
with a collaborative culture. Offerloop has a full comparison at
https://www.offerloop.ai/compare/citadel-vs-two-sigma

Q: How do I break into investment banking with no connections?
A: Cold outreach to alumni and analysts is the most effective path. Use
Offerloop to find verified contacts at target banks, generate personalized
cold emails, and track your outreach in the network tracker.

Q: Is Offerloop free?
A: Offerloop has a free tier with limited searches. Pro and Elite plans
unlock unlimited contact searches, full email generation, and coffee chat prep.
